back: [JA] 応力 carried by soil skeleton. Controls せん断強さ, 圧密, and 液状化. σ = 全応力, u = 間隙水圧. Foundation of all geotechnical analysis (テルツァーギ 1925).
[JA] モール・クーロン failure criterion. c' = effective 粘着力 (soil bonding). φ' = 摩擦角 (particle interlocking). Both depend on drainage conditions. CD/CU/UU tests in lab.
[JA] Time-dependent compression of saturated 粘土 as excess pore pressure dissipates. Tv = time factor. cv = coefficient of 圧密. H = drainage path. Longer drainage = more time.
[JA] Saturated loose 砂 loses strength when σ' → 0 during 地震. FL < 1.0 = liquefiable. CSR = cyclic 応力 ratio from 地震. CRR = cyclic resistance ratio from N値 or Vs.
[JA] Volume of voids / volume of solids. Loose 砂: e ≈ 0.7-0.9. Dense 砂: e ≈ 0.4-0.6. Related to porosity: n = e/(1+e). Decreases during 圧密.
[JA] State of compaction relative to loosest and densest states. Dr < 35% = loose. 35-65% = medium. 65-85% = dense. >85% = very dense. Correlated to 標準貫入試験 N値 and コーン貫入試験 qc.
[JA] Rate of water flow through soil per unit area per unit hydraulic gradient. 粘土: k = 10⁻⁸-10⁻¹⁰ m/s. シルト: 10⁻⁶-10⁻⁸. 砂: 10⁻³-10⁻⁵. 礫: >10⁻³.
[JA] テルツァーギ's general 支持力 equation. Nc, Nq, Nγ = dimensionless factors depending on φ'. q = surcharge = γDf. Allowable: qa = qu/FS (FS=3 typical).
[JA] Primary 圧密 沈下. Cc = compression index. H = layer thickness. e0 = initial 間隙比. σ'f = final 有効応力. σ'0 = initial. Use Cs for unloading/reloading.
[JA] Uniaxial compression of cohesive soil. Undrained せん断強さ cu = qu/2. Used for soft 粘土 classification. qu < 25 kPa = very soft. 25-50 = soft. 50-100 = medium. >200 = hard.
[JA] Primary wave. Particle motion parallel to propagation. Travels in solids and liquids. Typical in soil: 200-2000 m/s. Saturated soil dominated by water: Vp ≈ 1500 m/s. Used in refraction surveys.
[JA] Secondary wave. Particle motion perpendicular to propagation. Cannot travel through liquids. Key for Vs30, site classification, and dynamic 弾性係数. G = ρVs² (small ひずみ shear 弾性係数).
[JA] Time-average Vs in top 30m. Used for seismic site classification. Japan: 告示1457号. Class A: Vs30 > 600 m/s. Class B/C: 150-600. Class D (軟弱地盤): < 150 m/s.
[JA] Surface wave. Retrograde elliptical particle motion. Dispersive in layered media. Velocity depends on frequency (wavelength). Longer wavelengths sample deeper layers. Used in 表面波探査 surveys.
[JA] Dynamic (small-ひずみ) moduli from seismic velocities. G = shear 弾性係数. E = Young's 弾性係数. ν = Poisson's ratio. For saturated soil: ν → 0.5 (undrained). Dry 砂: ν ≈ 0.25-0.35.
[JA] Wave refraction at interface. At critical angle ic = arcsin(V₁/V₂), wave travels along interface as head wave. ic = arcsin(V₁/V₂). Used in 屈折法 to find layer depths.
[JA] 63.5 kg hammer, 760 mm drop. N = blows per 300 mm. Energy correction to 60% (N60). Overburden correction: (N1)60 = CN·N60. JIS A 1219. Japanese ER ≈ 72% (auto hammer).
[JA] Continuous profile of qc, fs, u2 at 20 mm/s. Qt = normalized tip resistance. Fr = friction ratio (%). Ic = soil behavior type index. Ic < 2.05: 砂. Ic > 2.95: 粘土.

[JA] ボーリング孔 seismic method measuring Vp and Vs at depth intervals. Surface source (hammer), downhole receiver. JGS 3511. Used for Vs30, dynamic moduli, seismic design. More accurate than surface 表面波探査.

jp: [JA] プレッシャーメーター試験
back: [JA] In-situ lateral 応力-ひずみ measurement. Inflatable probe in ボーリング孔. Ep = プレッシャーメーター 弾性係数. PL = limit pressure (ultimate). Useful in soft 岩, stiff 粘土s. Ménard プレッシャーメーター.
[JA] Measure bulk 比抵抗 to map geology. 4-electrode arrays. Wenner (lateral), Schlumberger (depth sounding), dipole-dipole (2D imaging). Saltwater: 0.2 Ωm. 岩: 1000+ Ωm.
[JA] Surface seismic method using first arrivals. Maps velocity layers. Requires V increasing with depth. Good for bed岩 depth, water table. Equipment: geophones + seismograph. 24-96 channel arrays.
[JA] Comprehensive geotechnical investigation of a site. Includes boring, sampling, in-situ tests (標準貫入試験, コーン貫入試験, PS検層), lab tests, and reporting. Required for all major construction in Japan.
[JA] Japanese method per 道路橋示方書 (Road Bridge Specification). Calculate CSR from 地震 acceleration. CRR from (N1)60cs. FL < 1.0 = liquefiable. Check at each soil layer. Typically < 20m depth.
[JA] Japanese seismic site classification per 告示1457号. 第1種地盤: 岩/stiff (Vs30>600). 第2種地盤: ordinary. 第3種地盤: soft (Vs30<150). TG (site period) also used.
[JA] Standard penetration test result. N < 4: very soft/loose. N = 4-10: soft/loose. N = 10-30: medium. N = 30-50: dense. N > 50: very dense or 岩. Key parameter for Japanese foundation design.
[JA] Long-term 沈下 of soft 粘土 under load. May take years to decades. Important in Tokyo, Osaka bay areas with thick alluvial 粘土. Monitoring with 沈下 plates and piezometers.
[JA] Maximum load a foundation can support without shear failure. Ultimate: qu. Allowable: qa = qu/FS. FS = 3 (static). Japanese foundation design: 建築基礎構造設計指針.
[JA] Investigation using physical properties of ground. Seismic (弾性波), electrical (電気探査), electromagnetic (電磁探査), gravity (重力探査). Non-invasive subsurface mapping. License: 物理探査技士.
[JA] Uses elastic wave propagation (P波, S波) for subsurface imaging. Methods: refraction (屈折法), reflection (反射法), 表面波探査 (表面波), PS検層 (PS検層). Fundamental to 物理探査技士 exam.
[JA] Solid 岩 beneath soil overburden. 岩盤品質指標 = 岩 Quality Designation. 岩盤品質指標 > 90%: excellent. 75-90%: good. 50-75%: fair. 25-50%: poor. <25%: very poor. Key for tunnel design.
[JA] Ratio of pre圧密 応力 to current 有効応力. OCR = 1: normally consolidated. OCR > 1: overconsolidated (stronger). Important for 沈下 prediction and Ko estimation.
[JA] Ambient noise (microtremors) recorded with 3-component seismometer. H/V spectral ratio peak = site resonant frequency f0. Non-invasive. Used for rapid site screening. Nakamura method (1989).

jp: [JA] ロータリーボーリング
back: [JA] Standard ground investigation method in Japan. Rotary drilling with water flush. JIS A 1220. Recovers core samples for logging. Enables 標準貫入試験, sampling, PS検層, プレッシャーメーター tests at depth.

[JA] Japanese national license for geological investigation. Categories: surface investigation, boring investigation, physical exploration. Required to supervise investigations for public works. Exam: written + practical.

[JA] Highest engineering qualification in Japan. Equivalent to international PE license. Geotechnical field: 応用理学部門 or 建設部門. Requires 7+ years experience + PE exam. Required for major design sign-off.

jp: [JA] モール・クーロン破壊基準
back: [JA] Defines the 応力 state at failure. Failure envelope is linear in τ-σ' space. Parameters c' and φ' from drained triaxial or direct shear tests. Most fundamental equation in 土質力学.

[JA] Multichannel Analysis of Surface Waves. Measures Rayleigh wave dispersion curve from geophone array. Inverts to get Vs profile. No ボーリング孔 needed. 24 channels, 4.5Hz geophones, 2-5m spacing typical.
[JA] Water pressure in soil voids. Hydrostatic (静水圧). Excess (過剰間隙水圧) from loading or 地震s. Measured by piezometer (ピエゾメーター). Excess u = 0 at equilibrium (fully consolidated).

[JA] Measurement of physical properties in ボーリング孔s. PS検層 (弾性波検層), electrical logging, gamma-ray logging. Essential for stratigraphy correlation and geophysical parameter measurement at depth in Japan.

[JA] Waterproof optical probe lowered into ボーリング孔 to observe wall conditions. Reveals: fracture orientation, aperture, joint infill, weathering grade, 地下水 inflow depth. 360° panoramic models available. Essential for tunnel and slope design in jointed 岩. Used in conjunction with core logging.

[JA] Inclination of fractures observed in ボアホールカメラ footage. Measured from horizontal. Steep dip (>60°) toward tunnel face = high wedge failure risk. Camera orientation sensor allows 3D fracture orientation mapping. Critical input for kinematic stability analysis.

[JA] In-situ lateral 応力-ひずみ test using inflatable probe in ボーリング孔. Ménard プレッシャーメーター. Measures Em (プレッシャーメーター 弾性係数) and PL (limit pressure). Em used in foundation 沈下 calculation. PL = lateral ground failure pressure. Best for soft 岩 and stiff 粘土.

[JA] プレッシャーメーター limit pressure — the asymptotic pressure at which soil/岩 fails laterally. Analogous to 支持力 in the lateral direction. PL correlates to undrained せん断強さ (cu ≈ PL/5.5) and pile lateral capacity. Key design parameter from Ménard プレッシャーメーター test.

[JA] Electromagnetic pulse radar for shallow subsurface imaging. Speed v depends on dielectric constant εr: dry 砂 v≈0.15 m/ns, wet 粘土 v≈0.07 m/ns. Depth range: 0.5m (2GHz) to ~30m (25MHz). Best in dry resistive ground. Poor in 粘土/saltwater. Used for utilities, voids, rebar, layer boundaries.

[JA] Controls electromagnetic wave speed in soil. Air εr=1. Dry 砂 εr=4-6. Moist 砂 εr=10-15. Saturated 粘土 εr=25-40. Water εr=81. High 含水比 = slow wave = poor 地中レーダー depth. Calibrated in field using known target depth or CMP survey.

[JA] Direct measurement of 支持力 at foundation level. Steel plate (300mm or 750mm) loaded incrementally. K30 = subgrade reaction coefficient — key for Japanese road design (≥110 MN/m³ for road base). E0 = 沈下 弾性係数 from elastic theory. Scale effect: real footing larger than plate.

[JA] Ratio of applied pressure to plate 沈下 at s=1.25mm during 平板載荷試験 (300mm plate). Used in Japanese road design to verify compaction. K30 = p(1.25mm) / 1.25mm × 1000. Also used for pile design and railroad track design in Japan (JIS A 1215). Values: soft 粘土 10-30, 砂 50-150, 礫 >200 MN/m³.

[JA] Core-based measure of 岩 mass fracturing degree. Only natural breaks counted — mechanical drill breaks excluded. Classification: Excellent 90-100%, Good 75-90%, Fair 50-75%, Poor 25-50%, Very Poor <25%. Foundation of RMR and Q-system. Introduced by Deere (1963). Standard in Japanese tunnel and dam investigation.

[JA] Total core recovery from drilling. Different from 岩盤品質指標 — TCR counts ALL recovered pieces including short ones. TCR=100% means perfect recovery, common in intact 岩. TCR<岩盤品質指標 is impossible. Low TCR in soft/fractured zones indicates very poor 岩 quality or drilling problems. Both TCR and 岩盤品質指標 are logged on ボーリング孔 records.

[JA] Maximum investigation depth for surface methods. 表面波探査: ~half the geophone array length. 屈折法: ~quarter of maximum geophone offset. 地中レーダー: depends on antenna frequency and soil conductivity. Electrical 比抵抗: depth ~ electrode spacing (Wenner). PS検層: unlimited with deep boring. Matching investigation depth to target depth is key survey design skill.

[JA] Classification of 岩 mass engineering quality. RMR (岩 Mass Rating, Bieniawski 1989): 6 parameters scored 0-100. RMR>80: Class I (very good), 61-80: Class II (good), 41-60: Class III (fair), 21-40: Class IV (poor), <21: Class V (very poor). Used directly for tunnel support design and 岩 slope analysis in Japan.

eq: Strike = direction of horizontal line on plane
back: [JA] Geometric description of a discontinuity (joint, fault, bedding). Strike = compass direction of horizontal intersection. Dip = maximum angle below horizontal. Critical for assessing instability: planar failure if dip direction = slope direction. Used with ボアホールカメラ data and geological mapping. Japan: important for tunnel alignment selection.
